roles.title: Application Engineer
description: Built full-stack internal platform (React 19, FastAPI, PostgreSQL 16) serving 4 business teams
Delivered 5+ releases: billing reports, SME porting, provisioning reconciliation, and RBAC
Replaced n8n webhooks with direct API integration, cutting response time and removing failure points
Designed RBAC system replacing 30 boolean columns with zero schema changes required
Fixed Apache Doris OOM errors on 5M+ record queries, eliminating production 500s
Automated recovery of 386 failed payments at 99.5% success rate
Deployed across 3 Kubernetes/Podman clusters with CI/CD

achievements.title: Game Changer Award 2026 Q1
achievements.description: Recognized for outstanding contributions in building innovative internal tools, automation systems, and scalable solutions that drove significant business impact

roles.title: Intern - IT & Data Automation Engineer
description: Built Slack/Jira bots reducing manual operations by approximately 40%
Migrated frontend to React.js and introduced Python analytics across 2 departments
Coordinated across Finance, IT, and Cybersecurity teams
Developed automated data pipelines reducing manual reporting effort
Built Python-based ETL workflows for data cleaning, validation, and transformation
